basics.name: Aryan Singh
basics.title: Software Development Engineer
basics.summary: I’m Aryan Singh, a B.Tech Information Technology student at Netaji Subhas University of Technology (NSUT) with strong foundations in Data Structures & Algorithms, C++, and core Computer Science fundamentals including Operating Systems, DBMS, and Computer Organization. I have hands-on experience in MERN stack development (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js) and enjoy building efficient, scalable, and reliable software systems. I bring a problem-solving mindset, attention to detail, and the ability to learn quickly in high-performance environments. Actively seeking Software Development Engineer (SDE) roles to contribute to impactful, large-scale products.

bullets: Focused on building and improving user-facing features using React.js.
Developed dynamic and reusable UI components that enhanced the overall user experience and contributed to a 15% increase in user engagement.
Took ownership of cross-browser testing for key product features, where I identified and resolved over 50 critical bugs, significantly reducing post-deployment issues by 30%.
Collaborated closely with a team of 8 developers in an Agile environment, which helped improve our workflow efficiency and accelerated project delivery by 10%.
Strengthened skills in frontend development, debugging, and teamwork in a fast-paced, real-world setting.

projects.title: Full-Stack Blogging Platform
bullets: Built fully responsive blogging site with JWT-based user authentication system supporting Login/Register/Logout functionality.
Designed RESTful APIs for full CRUD operations, achieving seamless frontend-backend synchronization and optimal user experience.
Integrated MongoDB Atlas for cloud-based NoSQL storage achieving 95% Lighthouse performance score and scalable data management.

projects.title: Gifting website
bullets: Contributed to the development of an innovative e-commerce platform, inspired by the concept of empowering small artists to sell their unique homemade artworks.
Implemented a user authentication system that enables users to register as either an artist or a customer, providing them with distinct buying and selling capabilities.
Leveraged PassportJS for efficient and reliable user authentication, ensuring a smooth and secure user experience.
Cultivated relationships with 15+ sponsors and vendors by presenting tailored sponsorship packages, securing 40000+ in funding to enhance event infrastructure and artist performances.
Revamped promotion with targeted campaigns, boosting NSUT fest turnout by 30% and setting record attendance.
Mentored 20+ underprivileged children weekly, delivering 150+ hours of educational at Prayas : The Neighbourhood Project.
Led 24-hour hackathon with 100+ participants; secured ₹50K sponsorship and grew club membership by 15%.
Led Techfest and Learning Leagues, engaging 200+ students in AI and cloud tech workshops across 5 events.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology, Information Technology (Network and Information Security)

achievements.title: LeetCode Pro
achievements.context: Achieved 400+ Data Structures and Algorithms problems and completed 400+ coding challenges on LeetCode.

achievements.title: Quiz Champion
achievements.context: Secured top 3 placements in 10+ inter-school and 2 state-level quiz competitions.

achievements.title: AIR 72
achievements.context: Achieved All India Rank (AIR) 72 in the International English Olympiad (IEO).

achievements.title: Sports Leadership
achievements.context: Competed for school cricket team for 6 years and college team for 2 seasons, demonstrating teamwork and leadership.
